destinations.avoid_season: April (extremely hot), June to October (monsoon rains)
destinations.group_size_fit: Great for solo travelers and groups alike
destinations.safety_notes: Generally safe for solo female travelers, especially in tourist areas. Standard city precautions apply (petty theft, scams targeting tourists). Well-developed tourist infrastructure.

destinations.avoid_season: November to March (wet season, heavy rain)
destinations.group_size_fit: Popular with solo travelers, especially in Ubud and Canggu
destinations.safety_notes: Considered one of the safest and most solo-female-friendly destinations in Southeast Asia, with a large expat and digital nomad community.

destinations.best_season: March to May, September to October (mild weather, fewer crowds)
destinations.avoid_season: July to August (very hot, peak tourist season)
destinations.group_size_fit: Great for solo travelers, couples, and small groups
destinations.safety_notes: One of the safest capital cities in Europe. Very solo-female-friendly with a walkable, well-lit city center.

destinations.avoid_season: December to February (very cold, mountain passes closed)
destinations.group_size_fit: Best suited for groups or experienced solo travelers due to rural infrastructure
destinations.safety_notes: Generally safe but less-developed tourist infrastructure outside Bishkek. Research current conditions before rural travel.

destinations.best_season: March to May (cherry blossoms), September to November (autumn colors)
destinations.group_size_fit: Excellent for solo travelers, extremely safe and easy to navigate
destinations.safety_notes: Consistently ranked among the safest cities in the world for solo female travelers. Very low crime rate.

destinations.best_season: May to September (warm, good for hiking the nearby Tian Shan mountains)
destinations.avoid_season: December to February (very cold, heavy snow)
destinations.group_size_fit: Good for solo travelers and small groups; more developed than most Central Asian cities
destinations.safety_notes: Generally safe with standard city precautions. More cosmopolitan and tourist-friendly than much of the region.

destinations.best_season: April to May, September to November (mild weather, fewer crowds)
destinations.avoid_season: July to August (very hot, peak tourist season)
destinations.group_size_fit: Great for solo travelers, couples, and groups
destinations.safety_notes: Generally safe for tourists with normal city precautions. Watch for pickpocketing and bar/taxi scams in tourist-heavy areas like Taksim and Sultanahmet.

destinations.best_season: March to May, October to November (dry, mild)
destinations.group_size_fit: Popular with solo travelers, especially in Roma/Condesa neighborhoods
destinations.safety_notes: Generally safe in main tourist and expat areas with standard precautions; avoid poorly lit areas at night and stick to registered taxis/rideshare apps.

destinations.best_season: November to March (summer, warm and dry)
destinations.avoid_season: June to August (winter, cold and rainy)
destinations.group_size_fit: Good for groups and experienced solo travelers; extra caution advised for solo travel at night
destinations.safety_notes: Petty crime and occasional muggings can occur in certain areas; stick to well-known tourist zones, avoid walking alone at night, and use trusted transport.

destinations.best_season: June to August (midnight sun, mild weather), February to March (northern lights)
destinations.avoid_season: None particularly bad, though winter driving can be difficult outside the capital
destinations.group_size_fit: Excellent for solo travelers; consistently ranked one of the safest countries in the world
destinations.safety_notes: Extremely low crime rate, considered one of the safest countries globally for solo and female travelers.

destinations.group_size_fit: Popular with solo travelers and backpackers
destinations.safety_notes: Generally safe with standard city precautions; watch for traffic when crossing streets and minor scams targeting tourists.

destinations.best_season: March to May, September to November (mild spring/autumn weather)
destinations.group_size_fit: Good for solo travelers and groups; popular with digital nomads
destinations.safety_notes: Generally safe in central/tourist neighborhoods; petty theft and occasional scams are the main risk, avoid displaying valuables.

destinations.best_season: March to May, September to November (mild, avoids extreme heat)
destinations.avoid_season: June to August (very hot, especially in the medina)
destinations.group_size_fit: Good for groups and solo travelers, though solo women may experience more street harassment than in other destinations
destinations.safety_notes: Generally safe from violent crime, but persistent touts and haggling-related friction are common; solo female travelers should dress modestly and stay in well-touristed areas.

destinations.best_season: March to May, September to November (mild, cherry blossoms/autumn colors)
destinations.avoid_season: July to August (hot, humid, monsoon rains)
destinations.group_size_fit: Excellent for solo travelers, extremely safe and easy to navigate
destinations.safety_notes: Very low crime rate, considered one of the safest major cities in the world for solo and female travelers.

destinations.best_season: December to February (summer, best for hiking/adventure sports)
destinations.avoid_season: June to August (winter, unless visiting for skiing)
destinations.group_size_fit: Excellent for solo travelers and groups; very safe and outdoor-focused
destinations.safety_notes: Extremely low crime rate; main safety considerations relate to outdoor activity risks (weather, terrain) rather than crime.
